# BrandBase | Conversion-First Websites & Performance Marketing

BrandBase specializes in high-performance digital infrastructure for businesses. We build fast, conversion-optimized websites and scale them with data-driven marketing.

## Core Services

### [Website Solutions](https://brandbase.in/website-solutions)
- [Premium Static Websites](https://brandbase.in/website-solutions/premium-static-websites): Zero upfront cost, high-speed performance.
- [Custom Web Design](https://brandbase.in/website-solutions/custom-web-design): Bespoke designs for established brands.
- [eCommerce Development](https://brandbase.in/website-solutions/ecommerce-development): High-converting Shopify and custom storefronts.
- [Website Redesign](https://brandbase.in/website-solutions/website-redesign): Rescuing lost conversions and technical debt.

### [Digital Marketing](https://brandbase.in/digital-marketing)
- [Performance Marketing](https://brandbase.in/digital-marketing/performance-marketing): Surgical Meta and Google Ads management.
- [Social Media Management](https://brandbase.in/digital-marketing/social-media-management): Brand-focused organic growth.
- [Local SEO & Google Maps](https://brandbase.in/digital-marketing/local-seo-google-maps): Dominating local search intent.

## Technical Foundation
- **Stack**: Next.js 15+, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript.
- **Hosting**: Netlify / Vercel.
- **Analytics**: GA4, Google Tag Manager, custom conversion tracking.
- **Performance**: Edge-cached, minimal JS footprint, optimized LCP.
